description.en: Create a new on-chain chess game on MultiversX. You play as white. Share the game ID with your opponent so they can join as black, or leave it open for anyone to join.
description.de: Erstelle ein neues On-Chain-Schachspiel auf MultiversX. Du spielst als Weiß. Teile die Spiel-ID mit deinem Gegner, damit er als Schwarz beitreten kann, oder lass es offen für jeden.
description.es: Create a new on-chain chess game on MultiversX. You play as white. Share the game ID with your opponent so they can join as black, or leave it open for anyone to join.
description.fr: Create a new on-chain chess game on MultiversX. You play as white. Share the game ID with your opponent so they can join as black, or leave it open for anyone to join.
description.ro: Create a new on-chain chess game on MultiversX. You play as white. Share the game ID with your opponent so they can join as black, or leave it open for anyone to join.
description.it: Create a new on-chain chess game on MultiversX. You play as white. Share the game ID with your opponent so they can join as black, or leave it open for anyone to join.

success.en: Game created! Share game ID {{GAME_ID}} with your opponent.
success.de: Spiel erstellt! Teile die Spiel-ID {{GAME_ID}} mit deinem Gegner.
success.es: Game created! Share game ID {{GAME_ID}} with your opponent.
success.fr: Game created! Share game ID {{GAME_ID}} with your opponent.
success.ro: Game created! Share game ID {{GAME_ID}} with your opponent.
success.it: Game created! Share game ID {{GAME_ID}} with your opponent.
